explanation: Added two KPI cards displaying live Freshsales data: total pipeline value (weighted by deal probability) and count of currently open deals. These pull real-time data directly from your Freshsales instance.

widget.title: Key Insight
widget.subtitle: Monitor pipeline velocity and deal stage progression to forecast revenue timing and identify bottlenecks early.

quickActions.label: Add Deal Stage Breakdown
quickActions.prompt: Show me deals by stage in a funnel chart

quickActions.label: Add Top Deals Table
quickActions.prompt: Show the largest open deals in a table

quickActions.label: Create Full Sales Dashboard
quickActions.prompt: Create a complete sales pipeline dashboard

issues.message: Widget "Pipeline Value" matches glossary term "Pipeline Value" (Sales) but uses source "freshsales_pipeline_value" — expected one of: deals_pipeline, deals_by_source, kpi_summary
